import _objectSpread from"c:/Users/lenovo/OneDrive/Desktop/Final Year Project/AI Powered Crypto Application/frontend/node_modules/@babel/runtime/helpers/esm/objectSpread2.js";import{create}from'zustand';import{subscribeWithSelector}from'zustand/middleware';import{cryptoAPI}from'../services/cryptoAPI';import{enhancedCryptoAPI}from'../services/enhancedCryptoAPI';import toast from'react-hot-toast';/**
 * Market Data Store
 * Manages cryptocurrency market data, price history, and analytics
 */export const useMarketStore=create()(subscribeWithSelector((set,get)=>({// Initial State
topCryptos:[],globalMetrics:null,priceHistory:{},technicalIndicators:{},marketSentiment:null,isLoading:false,error:null,selectedCrypto:null,timeframe:'24h',autoRefresh:true,refreshInterval:null,// Fetch top cryptocurrencies with enhanced real-time API
fetchTopCryptos:async function(){let limit=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:100;try{var _enhancedData$;set({isLoading:true,error:null});// Use enhanced API for better real-time data
console.log('🚀 Fetching real-time crypto data...');const enhancedData=await enhancedCryptoAPI.fetchRealTimePrices();// Convert to MarketData format
const marketData=enhancedData.slice(0,limit).map(crypto=>({id:crypto.id,symbol:crypto.symbol,name:crypto.name,price:crypto.price,priceChange24h:crypto.change24h,priceChangePercent24h:crypto.changePercent24h,marketCap:crypto.marketCap,marketCapChange24h:crypto.change24h*(crypto.marketCap/crypto.price),// Approximate
volume24h:crypto.volume24h,volumeChange24h:0,// Not provided by enhanced API
circulatingSupply:crypto.marketCap/crypto.price,totalSupply:crypto.marketCap/crypto.price,maxSupply:null,rank:crypto.rank,lastUpdated:new Date(crypto.lastUpdated).toISOString()}));set({topCryptos:marketData,isLoading:false});// Log success with source info
console.log("\u2705 Fetched ".concat(marketData.length," cryptocurrencies from: ").concat(((_enhancedData$=enhancedData[0])===null||_enhancedData$===void 0?void 0:_enhancedData$.source)||'Enhanced API'));// Update price history for charts
const state=get();enhancedData.forEach(crypto=>{if(crypto.priceHistory&&crypto.priceHistory.length>0){const priceHistory=crypto.priceHistory.map((price,index)=>({timestamp:Date.now()-(crypto.priceHistory.length-index)*3600000,// 1 hour intervals
price:price,volume:crypto.volume24h/24,// Approximate hourly volume
marketCap:price*(crypto.marketCap/crypto.price)}));state.priceHistory[crypto.symbol]=priceHistory;}});set({priceHistory:_objectSpread({},state.priceHistory)});}catch(error){const errorMessage=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Failed to fetch cryptocurrencies';console.error('❌ Market store - fetchTopCryptos error:',error);set({error:errorMessage,isLoading:false});// Try fallback to original API
try{console.log('🔄 Falling back to original API...');const fallbackData=await cryptoAPI.getTopCryptos(limit);set({topCryptos:fallbackData,isLoading:false,error:null});console.log('✅ Fallback data loaded successfully');}catch(fallbackError){console.error('❌ Fallback also failed:',fallbackError);}}},// Fetch global market metrics
fetchGlobalMetrics:async()=>{try{set({isLoading:true,error:null});const data=await cryptoAPI.getGlobalMetrics();set({globalMetrics:data,isLoading:false});// Log success
console.log('Fetched global market metrics');}catch(error){const errorMessage=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Failed to fetch global metrics';console.error('Market store - fetchGlobalMetrics error:',error);set({error:errorMessage,isLoading:false});// Don't show toast error since API has fallback - data should still be available
}},// Fetch price history for a specific crypto
fetchPriceHistory:async(symbol,timeframe)=>{try{const data=await cryptoAPI.getPriceHistory(symbol,timeframe);set(state=>({priceHistory:_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},state.priceHistory),{},{[symbol]:data})}));}catch(error){const errorMessage=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Failed to fetch price history';toast.error(errorMessage);}},// Fetch technical indicators
fetchTechnicalIndicators:async symbol=>{try{const data=await cryptoAPI.getTechnicalIndicators(symbol);set(state=>({technicalIndicators:_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},state.technicalIndicators),{},{[symbol]:data})}));}catch(error){const errorMessage=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Failed to fetch technical indicators';toast.error(errorMessage);}},// Fetch market sentiment
fetchMarketSentiment:async()=>{try{const data=await cryptoAPI.getMarketSentiment();set({marketSentiment:data});}catch(error){const errorMessage=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Failed to fetch market sentiment';toast.error(errorMessage);}},// Search cryptocurrencies
searchCryptos:async query=>{try{return await cryptoAPI.searchCryptos(query);}catch(error){const errorMessage=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Failed to search cryptocurrencies';toast.error(errorMessage);return[];}},// Get single crypto quote
getCryptoQuote:async symbol=>{try{return await cryptoAPI.getCryptoQuote(symbol);}catch(error){const errorMessage=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Failed to fetch crypto quote';toast.error(errorMessage);return null;}},// Set selected cryptocurrency
setSelectedCrypto:symbol=>{set({selectedCrypto:symbol});},// Set timeframe
setTimeframe:timeframe=>{set({timeframe});},// Set auto-refresh
setAutoRefresh:enabled=>{set({autoRefresh:enabled});if(enabled){get().startAutoRefresh();}else{get().stopAutoRefresh();}},// Clear error
clearError:()=>{set({error:null});},// Refresh all data
refreshAllData:async()=>{const{fetchTopCryptos,fetchGlobalMetrics,fetchMarketSentiment}=get();await Promise.all([fetchTopCryptos(),fetchGlobalMetrics(),fetchMarketSentiment()]);},// Start real-time updates with enhanced frequency
startAutoRefresh:()=>{const{refreshInterval,autoRefresh}=get();if(refreshInterval)clearInterval(refreshInterval);if(autoRefresh){const interval=setInterval(()=>{const state=get();// Ultra-fast refresh every 3 seconds for real-time price updates
console.log('🔄 Auto-refreshing crypto data...');state.fetchTopCryptos(20);state.fetchGlobalMetrics();if(state.selectedCrypto){state.fetchTechnicalIndicators(state.selectedCrypto);state.fetchPriceHistory(state.selectedCrypto,state.timeframe);}},3000);// 3 seconds for ultra-responsive real-time updates
set({refreshInterval:interval});console.log('✅ Real-time auto-refresh started (3-second intervals)');}},// Stop real-time updates
stopAutoRefresh:()=>{const{refreshInterval}=get();if(refreshInterval){clearInterval(refreshInterval);set({refreshInterval:null});}}})));// Initialize auto-refresh when store loads
useMarketStore.getState().startAutoRefresh();export default useMarketStore;
